## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (format + typecheck + lint + test + build)
- [ ] New adapters have at least one test in `tests/adapter/`
- [ ] `registry.json` updated (if adding an adapter)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added
